cards.basicText: If Juggernaut has 4 or more Momentum, this card's effects cannot be cancelled.
cards.duringText: This card's value is equal to Juggernaut's Momentum value.
cards.title: UNSTOPPABLE FORCE

cards.basicText: When you are forced to discard a random card or reveal your hand, you may discard this card to ignore that effect.
cards.immediateText: Cancel all effects on your opponent's card.
cards.title: Shielded Helm

cards.afterText: Draw 1 card. If you won the combat, draw 2 cards instead.
cards.title: Regroup

cards.duringText: If your fighter started this turn in a different space, this card's value is 5 instead.
cards.title: Momentous Shift

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, choose one of the fighters in the combat and move them up to 2 spaces.
cards.title: Skirmish

cards.basicText: Move Juggernaut spaces up to his Momentum value. Gain 1 action.
cards.title: MOMENTUM

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, your opponent must discard 1 random card.
cards.title: Knuckle Dusters

cards.basicText: You may play this card face up to move Juggernaut adjacent to any opposing fighter in his zone, along the shortest path.
cards.duringText: If you played this card face up, this card has +1 value for each space Juggernaut moved.
cards.title: Bull Rush

cards.afterText: Move Juggernaut spaces up to his Momentum value. Then, deal 2 damage to all adjacent fighters.
cards.duringText: Spend any amount of Momentum. This card's value is +1 for each Momentum spent.
cards.title: Raging Charge

cards.basicText:
Spend any amount of Momentum. For every 2 spent, choose an effect:
› Return an UNSTOPPABLE FORCE card from your discard pile to your hand.
› Gain 1 action.
› Draw 2 cards.
cards.title: CRIMSON GEM OF CYTTORAK

cards.duringText: Gain momentum until Juggernaut has 6. Deal 1 damage to Juggernaut for each Momentum gained. Increase this card's value by 1 for each Momentum gained.
cards.title: Exemplar of Cyttorak

hero.name: JUGGERNAUT
hero.specialAbility: When you move Juggernaut any amount of spaces, Juggernaut gains 1 Momentum. Juggernaut has a maximum of 6 momentum. If an opposing player moves him, or he does not move on your turn, set his Momentum to 0.

sidekick.name: Sidekick
sidekick.quote:
"I'm the Juggernaut! Ain't nothin' -- ain't nobody -- can beat me!"
                                                       -Cain Marko

name: The Juggernaut
note:
v0.11 - Health reduced to 20, Unstoppable Force's effect is now uncanceleable at 4+ Momentum, various BOOST value adjustments.
Thanks to Bryden for the clearer wording on EXEMPLAR OF CYTTORAK.
